description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsBlack upper with gold hardware and two short handlesHas a flap that goes over the two straps and has a magnetic button closureHas one main zipped compartmentFabric inner with two pouches, a zipped pocket and a zipped separatorHas a zipped pocket at the backMaterial and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 34 cmWidth: 40 cmDepth: 11 cm
